2605.18053.title: Protection Is (Nearly) All You Need: Structural Protection Dominates Scoring in Globally Capped KV Eviction
2605.18053.paper_summary: We study KV cache eviction under a shared globally capped decode-time harness. Seven policies (LRU, H2O, SnapKV, StreamingLLM, Ada-KV, QUEST, Random) share a prompt-boundary vulnerability: without structural protection, they collapse to near-zero quality on six pure-transformer models (F1$\leq$0.064). Reserving 10\% of cache at each boundary recovers 69--90\% of the $C{=}2{,}048$ reference-ceiling quality on seven LongBench models at $C{=}256$ (13\% retention); a ten-model panel spans 68--98\%. An attention-mass pilot (Qwen2.5-3B, $N{=}30$) suggests why: the position-0 sink holds ${\sim}75\%$ of prefix mass, while other boundary tokens sit near ${\sim}0.41{\times}$ uniform expectation, so attention scorers retain the sink but still drop structurally critical tokens. With protection, simplified score-isolation variants are TOST-equivalent to LRU at $K{=}32$ ($Δ{=}0.02$); at $K{=}8$, attention policies pairwise converge yet beat LRU by 0.011--0.021 F1 across $C{=}256$ and $C{=}512$. Faithful Ada-KV/QUEST add ${\sim}0.03$--$0.04$ F1 on Mistral-7B and Phi-3.5 beyond simplified variants. A NIAH-32K regime-transfer pilot on Qwen3-4B (decode vs.\ prefill, $C{\in}\{512,2048\}$) shows near-identical protection lifts (ratio 0.99--1.00). At 64K, protection helps but recovery is modest; faithful per-head scoring matches full-cache ceiling on Gemma-3-4B at 6.3\% retention only when the model already supports strong 64K retrieval without eviction. Overall: protection dominates; scoring differences are secondary once boundaries are guarded; per-head allocation gives a further modest gain.
2605.18053.paper_summary_zh: 我們研究在共享全球上限的解碼時間裝置下的KV快取驅逐。七種策略（LRU、H2O、SnapKV、StreamingLLM、Ada-KV、QUEST、隨機）共享一個提示邊界脆弱性：在沒有結構保護的情況下，它們在六個純Transformer模型上崩潰至接近零的質量（F1$\leq$0.064）。在每個邊界保留10\%的快取可恢復七個LongBench模型在$C{=}256$時的$C{=}2{,}048$參考上限質量的69--90\%（13\%保留）；一個十模型面板範圍在68--98\%之間。一個注意力質量試點（Qwen2.5-3B，$N{=}30$）暗示了原因：位置0的匯聚持有${\sim}75\%$的前綴質量，而其他邊界符號接近${\sim}0.41{\times}$均勻期望，因此注意力評分者保留了匯聚，但仍然丟失了結構上關鍵的符號。通過保護，簡化的分數隔離變體在$K{=}32$時與LRU等效（$Δ{=}0.02$）；在$K{=}8$時，注意力策略成對收斂，卻在$C{=}256$和$C{=}512$上超越LRU 0.011--0.021 F1。忠實的Ada-KV/QUEST在Mistral-7B和Phi-3.5上超過簡化變體增加了${\sim}0.03$--$0.04$ F1。一個在Qwen3-4B上的NIAH-32K制度轉移試點（解碼與預填，$C{\in}\{512,2048\}$）顯示出幾乎相同的保護提升（比率0.99--1.00）。在64K時，保護有所幫助，但恢復有限；忠實的每頭評分在Gemma-3-4B上僅在模型已經支持強大的64K檢索而不驅逐時，與全快取上限匹配6.3\%的保留。總體而言：保護主導；一旦邊界受到保護，評分差異是次要的；每頭分配提供了進一步的適度增益。
2605.18053.author: Gabriel Garcia et.al.
